diagrams.title: Power Consumption Breakdown
diagrams.description: Shows the various components contributing to total runtime power consumption in a typical computer system
diagrams.purpose: Understanding where energy goes helps prioritize optimization efforts

diagrams.title: Dynamic vs Static Power
diagrams.description: Comparison of dynamic power (switching) and static power (leakage) across different technology nodes
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the trade-offs in power consumption as transistors get smaller

diagrams.title: DVFS Operation
diagrams.description: Shows how voltage and frequency change based on workload demands over time
elements: High workload: High V, High f
Medium workload: Medium V, Medium f
Low workload: Low V, Low f
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how DVFS adapts to workload for energy savings

diagrams.title: Energy vs Time Relationship
diagrams.description: Illustrates how Energy = Power × Time and the impact of different optimization strategies
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the energy-time trade-off in optimization strategies
